creator: c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
text:
Updating www/rubygem-passenger gives error when updating.

root@amnesiac# make
===>  rubygem-passenger-3.0.17 If NO_BUILD is used, then USE_APACHE_RUN is sufficient. Please fix your Makefile.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger.

Fix: 

I am unaware how to fix this issue.
How-To-Repeat: 1. Update ports
2. portmaster -adB
3. Wait for it to die on passenger
